## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## AI Role

- [ ] Claude Code implementation/refactor
- [ ] Codex QA/tests/orchestration
- [ ] ChatGPT strategy/architecture
- [ ] Human/manual edit

## Risk Class

- [ ] No behavior change
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] API/backend
- [ ] Trading logic
- [ ] Infrastructure/CI
- [ ] Secrets/config

## Verification

- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Targeted backend tests:
- [ ] Targeted frontend tests:
- [ ] `make verify-full` if live DB/integration behavior changed

## Trading Logic Gate

Complete this section if signal scoring, ranking, conflict resolution, risk, position sizing, backtesting, or prompt-to-thesis behavior changed.

- Hypothesis:
- Expected impact:
- Benchmark evidence:
- Human approval:

## Notes

Mention skipped checks, known failures, or follow-up work.
